violations.text: Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (tuna, imitation crab sticks, imitation crab shredded flakes) were observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. All seafood was observed held below 38 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The person in charge, removed the seafood from the packaging at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the prep area and storage unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
